All Classes and Interfaces

Class
Description
BrokerBootstrap
Handles the configuration and binding of the Netty server.
BrokerChannelInitializer
Configures the Netty pipeline for processing EverestMQ broker traffic.
BrokerConfig
Configuration for the EverestMQ broker.
BrokerRequest
Represents a request from a client to the broker.
BrokerRequestHandler
Netty inbound handler that bridges network requests to the BrokerService.
BrokerResponse
Represents a response from the broker to a client.
BrokerService
Service implementation for processing EverestMQ broker commands.
ClientChannelInitializer
Initializes the Netty pipeline for a client-to-broker connection.
ClientConnection
Manages a TCP connection to the broker.
ClientResponseHandler
Netty inbound handler that correlates incoming broker responses to pending client requests.
CommandType
Commands recognized by the EverestMQ broker.
EverestBrokerServer
Main application class for the EverestMQ broker.
EverestClient
High-level EverestMQ client API.
EverestConfig
Common configuration for EverestMQ.
EverestConsumer
EverestMQ message consumer.
EverestConsumerException
Thrown when a message consumer operation fails.
EverestMessage
Represents a single message in EverestMQ.
EverestMQException
Base exception for all EverestMQ related errors.
EverestProducer
EverestMQ message producer.
EverestProducerException
Thrown when a message producer operation fails.
EverestTimeoutException
Thrown when a broker request times out.
FetchRequestManager
Manages pending FETCH requests for long-polling.
FileAppender
Handles low-level append-only writes to a topic's .log file.
LogConfigurator
Programmatically configures Logback based on settings from broker.properties.
LogManager
Manages the lifecycle of LogWriters and performs broker crash recovery.
LogReader
Reads messages from topic log files.
LogWriter
High-level writer that manages offset assignment and record persistence.
MessageCodec
Stateless codec for EverestMQ protocol frames.
RequestDecoder
Netty decoder that converts raw ByteBuf frames into BrokerRequest objects.
ResponseDecoder
Netty decoder that converts raw ByteBuf frames from the broker into BrokerResponse objects.
ResponseEncoder
Netty encoder that converts BrokerResponse objects into binary ByteBuf frames.
StatusCode
Status codes returned by the EverestMQ broker.
TopicMeta
Metadata for a single topic.
TopicRegistry
Thread-safe registry for all active topics on the broker.
TopicValidator
Validates topic names against EverestMQ rules.
